scripts.format: cargo fmt --all && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web run format && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web run format
scripts.lint: cargo clippy --all-targets --workspace -- --deny warnings && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web run lint && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web run typecheck && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web run typecheck
scripts.test: cargo test --workspace && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web test && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web test
scripts.check: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --workspace -- --deny warnings && cargo test --workspace && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web run lint && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web run typecheck && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-web test && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web run lint && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web run typecheck && npm --workspace cursor-optimizer-installer-web test
